arguments.title: Mutual NDA fallback clause redline
arguments.content:
## Mutual NDA fallback clause redline

Original: The Receiving Party will try to protect Confidential Information using reasonable efforts.

Revised: The Receiving Party must protect Confidential Information using at least the same degree of care it uses for its own similar confidential information, and never less than reasonable care.

Rationale: The revision replaces aspirational language with a concrete obligation and adds a fallback standard if internal practices are weak.
